goalbuddy_receipt_v1.rationale: One local declaration causes all remaining contrast failures: finishStatus overrides the dark page's light foreground with #52643b. Replace it with the already-proven dark-surface token #d8ded4; descendants inherit it. No selector/DOM/layout/logic/test change.

worker_package.objective: Change only finishStatus color, then complete every final gate.
verify: Require CSS/TSX/E2E hashes from T089 and one-declaration diff.
Run scoped format/type, isolated build, unchanged cooking E2E.
Run full gates, three protected E2Es, disposable DB, live PID/port/hash/diff/status integrity.
stop_if: Hash differs or diff beyond one color.
Contrast remains or any selector/global/DOM/layout/logic/test change needed.

evidence: #d8ded4 already passes on same dark surface.

parallel_safety.rationale: One declaration and serial final lifecycle.
